Name: DAMAGE_EFFECT_MATERIAL_PARAM
Description: Defines visual effects (SFX), effect sizes, and dummy references used when attacks or impacts interact with different material types and surfaces.

Fields.Name: Body: SFX 1
Fields.Description: Primary visual effect ID used for normal body material interactions.

Fields.Name: Body: SFX 2
Fields.Description: Secondary visual effect ID used for normal body material interactions.

Fields.Name: Body: Size 1
Fields.Description: Primary size or scale parameter for body material effects.

Fields.Name: Body: Size 2
Fields.Description: Secondary size or scale parameter for body material effects.

Fields.Name: Petrified Boss Body: Size 1

Fields.Name: Petrified Boss Body: Size 2
Fields.Description: Secondary size or scale parameter for body material effects.
